subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward the Most Exalted Horizon! The opposers have claimed that this Wronged One hath spoken concerning the verses of the Point [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الافق الاعلی معرضین بیان گفته اند اینمظلوم از آیات نقطه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
